caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 21 kt winds with 4.4 ft wave heights and a 62% rain probability, while nearby ports have less severe conditions, and Aruba has 20 kt winds with less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 25 kt winds with 5.4 ft wave heights and a 25% rain probability, while Istanbul has relatively calm conditions with 12 kt winds. The Eastern Mediterranean will see the most significant impact, with Mykonos being the top affected port due to these weather conditions.
